-spec solve(int, int, list(list(int))) -> int.

solve(M, N, WaitCost) ->
    % Initialize a 2D array to store the minimum cost to reach each cell
    DP = lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc) ->
            Row = lists:map(
                fun(J) ->
                    % Entry cost for cell (I, J)
                    (I + 1) * (J + 1)
                end,
                lists:seq(0, N - 1)
            ),
            [Row | Acc]
        end,
        [],
        lists:seq(0, M - 1)
    ),
    % Directions: right (0, 1), down (1, 0)
    Directions = [{0, 1}, {1, 0}],
    % Priority queue to always process the cell with the minimum cost
    Pq = priority_queue:insert(
        {dp(0, 0, DP), {0, 0}},
        priority_queue:empty()
    ),
    % Use a priority queue to always process the cell with the minimum cost
    {Result, _} = process(Pq, DP, Directions, WaitCost, M, N),
    Result.

process(Pq, DP, Directions, WaitCost, M, N) ->
    case priority_queue:peek(Pq) of

                    % Check if we have reached the destination

```erlang
-spec solve(int, int, list(list(int))) -> int.

solve(M, N, WaitCost) ->
    % Initialize a 2D array to store the minimum cost to reach each cell
    DP = lists:map(
        fun(_) -> lists:map(fun(_) -> erlang:system_time(millisecond) + 1 end, lists:seq(1, N)) end,
        lists:seq(1, M)
    ),
    % Starting cell (0, 0)
    DP1 = update_dp(DP, 0, 0, (0 + 1) * (0 + 1)),
    % Directions: right (0, 1), down (1, 0)
    Directions = [{0, 1}, {1, 0}],
    % Use a priority queue to always process the cell with the minimum cost
    Pq = priority_queue:insert({dp_value(DP, 0, 0), {0, 0}}, []),
    % Process the priority queue
    {_, Result} = process_pq(Pq, Directions, M, N, WaitCost, DP),
    Result.

update_dp(DP, X, Y, Value) ->
    NewDP = lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            if I == X -> lists:map(fun(J) -> if J == Y -> Value; true -> erlang:system_time(millisecond) + 1 end end, lists:seq(1, N)) end;
            true -> lists:map(fun(J) -> erlang:system_time(millisecond) + 1 end, lists:seq(1, N)) end
        end,
        lists:seq(1, M)
    ),
    NewDP.

dp_value(DP, X, Y) ->
    lists:nth(X, DP) |> lists:nth(Y).

process_pq(Pq, Directions, M, N, WaitCost, DP) ->
    case priority_queue:peek(Pq) of
        {Cost, {X, Y}} ->
            % If we have already found a better path to this cell, skip it
            if Cost > dp_value(DP, X, Y) ->
                process_pq(priority_queue:delete(Pq), Directions, M, N, WaitCost, DP);
            true ->
                % Check if we have reached the destination
                if X == M - 1 andalso Y == N - 1 ->
                    {Cost, dp_value(DP, X, Y)};
                true ->
                    % Check all possible directions (right and down)
                    NewPq = lists:foldl(
                        fun({DirX, DirY}, Acc) ->
                            Nx = X + DirX,
                            Ny = Y + DirY,
                            if Nx >= 0, Nx < M, Ny >= 0, Ny < N ->
                                NewCost = Cost + (Nx + 1) * (Ny + 1),
                                NewDP = update_dp(DP, Nx, Ny, NewCost),
                                priority_queue:insert({NewCost, {Nx, Ny}}, Acc);
                            true ->
                                Acc
                            end
                        end,
                        Pq,
                        Directions
                    ),
                    process_pq(NewPq, Directions, M, N, WaitCost, DP)
                end
            end
    end.
```

```erlang
-spec solve(int, int, list(list(int))) -> int.

solve(M, N, WaitCost) ->
    % Initialize a 2D array to store the minimum cost to reach each cell
    DP = lists:map(fun(_) -> lists:map(fun(_) -> infinity end, lists:seq(1, N)) end, lists:seq(1, M)),
    % Starting cell (0, 0)
    DP1 = set_element(1, 1, DP),
    % Directions: right (0, 1), down (1, 0)
    Directions = [{0, 1}, {1, 0}],
    % Use a priority queue to always process the cell with the minimum cost
    PQ = priority_queue:insert({dp_value(DP, 1, 1), {1, 1}}, priority_queue:empty()),
    % Process the priority queue
    {Result, _} = process_pq(PQ, DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost),
    Result.

process_pq(PQ, DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost) ->
    case priority_queue:peek(PQ) of
        {CurrentCost, {X, Y}} ->
            % If we have already found a better path to this cell, skip it
            case current_cost(DP, X, Y) == CurrentCost of
                true ->
                    % Check if we have reached the destination
                    case {X, Y} of
                        {M, N} ->
                            {CurrentCost, _} = get_value(DP, M, N),
                            {CurrentCost, _};
                        _ ->
                            % Check all possible directions (right and down)
                            NewPQ = process_directions(PQ, DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost, X, Y),
                            process_pq(NewPQ, DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost)
                    end;
                false ->
                    % If we have already found a better path to this cell, skip it
                    process_pq(priority_queue:delete(PQ), DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost)
            end;
        _ ->
            {infinity, _} % Should not happen
    end.

process_directions(PQ, DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost, X, Y) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun({DirX, DirY}, Acc) ->
            NX = X + DirX,
            NY = Y + DirY,
            case {NX, NY} of
                {X1, Y1} when X1 >= 1, X1 =< M, Y1 >= 1, Y1 =< N ->
                    NewCost = current_cost(DP, X, Y) + (NX + 1) * (NY + 1),
                    case new_cost(DP, NX, NY, NewCost) of
                        true ->
                            NewDP = set_element(NX, NY, NewCost, DP),
                            NewPQ = priority_queue:insert({NewCost, {NX, NY}}, Acc),
                            NewPQ;
                        false ->
                            Acc
                    end;
                _ ->
                    Acc
            end
        end, PQ, Directions).

current_cost(DP, X, Y) ->
    lists:nth(X, DP) |> lists:nth(Y).

set_element(X, Y, Value, DP) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            if I == X ->
                lists:map(
                    fun(J) ->
                        if J == Y ->
                            Value;
                            true ->
                            lists:nth(I, DP) |> lists:nth(J)
                        end
                    end, lists:seq(1, length(lists:nth(I, DP))))
            ; true ->
                lists:nth(I, DP)
            end
        end, lists:seq(1, length(DP))).

new_cost(DP, X, Y, NewCost) ->
    lists:nth(X, DP) |> lists:nth(Y) == NewCost.

get_value(DP, X, Y) ->
    lists:nth(X, DP) |> lists:nth(Y).
```

    DP1 = set_element(1, 1, DP, 1),
    % Directions: right (0, 1), down (1, 0)
    Directions = [{0, 1}, {1, 0}],
    % Use a priority queue to always process the cell with the minimum cost
    Pq = priority_queue:insert({dp_value(DP1, 1, 1), {1, 1}}, []),
    % Process the priority queue
    process_pq(Pq, DP1, Directions, M, N, WaitCost).

process_pq(Pq, DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost) ->
    case priority_queue:peek(Pq) of
        {CurrentCost, {X, Y}} ->
            % If we have already found a better path to this cell, skip it
            case dp_value(DP, X, Y) of
                C when C < CurrentCost ->
                    priority_queue:pop(Pq),
                    process_pq(Pq, DP, Directions, M, N, WaitCost);
                _ ->
                    % Check if we have reached the destination
                    case {X, Y} of
                        {M, N} ->
                            % The answer is the minimum cost to reach the destination
                            dp_value(DP, M, N);
                        _ ->
                            % Check all possible directions (right and down)
                            NewPq = lists:foldl(
                                fun({DirX, DirY}, Acc) ->
                                    Nx = X + DirX,
                                    Ny = Y + DirY,
                                    case {Nx, Ny} of
                                        {X1, Y1} when X1 >= 1, X1 =< M, Y1 >= 1, Y1 =< N ->
                                            NewCost = CurrentCost + (Nx + 1) * (Ny + 1),
                                            case dp_value(DP, Nx, Ny) of
                                                C when C > NewCost ->
                                                    NewDP = set_element(X1, Y1, DP, NewCost),
                                                    priority_queue:insert({NewCost, {X1, Y1}}, Acc);
                                                _ ->
                                                    Acc
                                            end;
                                        _ ->
                                            Acc
                                    end
                                end, Pq, Directions)
                    end
            end
    end.

dp_value(DP, X, Y) ->
    lists:nth(X, DP) |> lists:nth(Y).

set_element(X, Y, DP, Value) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I) when I == X ->
            lists:map(
                fun(J) when J == Y ->
                    Value
                end, lists:seq(1, length(lists:nth(I, DP))))
        end, lists:seq(1, length(DP)))
end.
